recommendations.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
recommendations.overview: The two American Ninjas, Joe Armstrong and Sean Davidson, team up to do battle against a terrorist and his band of Ninjas.

recommendations.title: The Wash
recommendations.overview: With the rent due and his car booted, Sean has to come up with some ends...and fast. When his best buddy and roommate Dee Loc, suggests that Sean get a job busting suds down at the local car wash.

recommendations.title: The Karate Kid

recommendations.title: G.I. Joe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: G.I. Joe faces a new enemy as an ancient society of snake people known as Cobra-La try to forcefully take back the earth from those who drove them underground eons ago.

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: An Eye for an Eye
recommendations.overview: Sean Kane is forced to resign from the San Francisco Police Department's Narcotics Division when he goes berserk after his partner is murdered. He decides to fight alone and follows a trail of drug traffickers into unexpected high places.

recommendations.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
